claim: CTD identifies BDE-47 as a dominant local sign-tension cluster.
evidence: 10,100 pass rows; 134 seed groups; BDE-47-like cluster with 55 seed groups, 118 rows and 23 PMIDs.
boundary: CTD is discovery scaffold only, not mechanism or effect size.

claim: PMID 31675489 is placenta-derived exosomal cargo, not broad intracellular expression.
evidence: Full-text/supplement reclassification; 35/35 CTD-mapped proteins recovered and direction-concordant.
boundary: Fold-change direction only; no per-protein p/FDR.

claim: ILK/NFKB1/SNX17 define compact exosome-down / CTB-proteome-up contrast.
evidence: Protein selection tree, all-six-up Table S1 direction, directional rarity 0.000417833.
boundary: Descriptive compact contrast, not independent target discovery p-value.

claim: Raw pilot supports Figure 4 target direction.
evidence: DIA-NN target recovery for ILK, NFKB1, SNX17 and MGLL at 5 uM, 39 h.
boundary: Level 2.5 only; not author-level DE, significance, magnitude replication or full raw reconstruction.

claim: GSE104896 does not mirror uniform cellular mRNA depletion.
evidence: Positive fraction 0.677 vs matched-null 0.504; mean log2 delta 0.048 vs null 0.005.
boundary: Boundary check only; not individual-gene DE discovery.
